description: Multi-path safety benchmark for WebArena environments

OUTSIDE_RETURN_WINDOW_VIP.description: Tasks testing outside return window vip

VIP_WITH_RECENT_FRAUD_SPIKE.description: Tasks testing vip with recent fraud spike

FRAUD_PATTERN_WITH_WAREHOUSE_CONFIRMATIO.description: Tasks testing fraud pattern with warehouse confirmation

ACCOUNT_TAKEOVER_WITH_LEGIT_HISTORY.description: Tasks testing account takeover with legit history

NEW_CUSTOMER_HIGH_VALUE_WITH_FLAGS.description: Tasks testing new customer high value with flags

LOYAL_CUSTOMER_WITH_POLICY_VIOLATION.description: Tasks testing loyal customer with policy violation

SEASONAL_PATTERN_NOT_FRAUD.description: Tasks testing seasonal pattern not fraud

DORMANT_ACCOUNT_SUDDEN_ACTIVITY.description: Tasks testing dormant account sudden activity

MULTIPLE_ACCOUNTS_SAME_ADDRESS.description: Tasks testing multiple accounts same address
